_comment: Sample headless run configuration for scheduled or automated runs. Copy this file, adjust the values, then launch with config=/absolute/path/to/your-launch-config.json.
_usage: CLI values override config-file values. _comment-style fields are ignored by the parser and exist only for documentation.

connection._comment: Choose the transport and destination/bind settings used for the replay session.
connection._grpcHeaderPathKey_comment: grpcHeaderPathKey and grpcHeaderPath are only used when protocol=grpc and mode=client.
connection._httpFormat_comment: httpFormat, httpTls, httpTlsCaPath, httpTlsCertPath, httpTlsKeyPath, and httpPath are only used when protocol=http.

headless._comment: Set runMode to headless (or silent) to run without the UI.

output._comment: Optional logging and completion artifacts for automation, schedulers, or CI.

streaming._comment: Control replay timing, looping, and the active line range.
